subject: ToolGlyph
adopted_concept: Exploration tool state glyph family for minimal HUD and material/VFX prototyping.

asset_request.source: inferred because no visual asset_request.yaml was present in the checkout
out_of_scope_asset_requests: artifacts/Reports/SFXPack_v0_1_0/asset_request.yaml is an SFX Session request and was not used for this visual asset family.
asset_request.usage_context: FOURFOLD ECHOES minimal HUD: one exploration tool state readability; optional 3D material/VFX atlas use

prompt_contract:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: Unity UI icon family plus 3D material atlas maps
Primary request: compact FOURFOLD ECHOES exploration-tool state glyphs, no text, no background
Style/medium: procedural 2D raster icon, folded reliquary miniature product line
Subject: one central exploration instrument glyph with fourfold folded slabs, thick chipped tabs, visible socket, and a single signal thread
Composition/framing: centered silhouette, generous transparent padding, readable at 64px, 128px, and 256px
Color palette: saturated but controlled ivory stone, warm gold, cool blue signal, muted cooldown variant
Materials/textures: broad color planes, large bevel read, sparse normal detail, no photoreal grime, no noisy fantasy texture
Constraints: transparent PNG, no labels, no letters, no background plate, no cast shadow, variation by outline/material/socket/signal temperature rather than color alone
Avoid: generic magic staff, antenna, inventory/crafting/quest symbols, external IP style names, fine decorative clutter, text, watermark

unity_import.texture_type: Sprite (2D and UI) for individual icons; Default/Normal Map for atlas maps as needed

texture_maps.Mask_channels: R=silhouette/occlusion, G=material roughness group, B=emissive mask, A=alpha

variants.name: Ready
variants.difference: complete silhouette, vertical ready thread, bright central socket

variants.name: Pulse
variants.difference: expanded side/top/bottom tabs and broad signal rays

variants.name: TargetHit
variants.difference: exposed socket/star and lower latch read as tool success

variants.name: Cooldown
variants.difference: closed shutter plates, darker material, dim signal slit

qc.edge_bleed: none detected in alpha-corner and bbox checks after inset pass
qc.tile_seam: not applicable; icons and atlas, not loop tiles
